title: mixson
description: A library that allows resource manipulation at runtime
body:
![Mixson Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ac970f58b8bc0d14541578368f94ab9d1b99498.png)

A library that allows resource manipulation at runtime




| MC Version | *Quilt Version | Fabric Version | NeoForge Version | |---------------|-----------------|-----------------|------------------| | 26.1.x | ❌ Use Fabric | ✅ `v2.1.0` | ✅ `v2.1.0` | | 1.21.11 | ⚠️ `v1.3.1` | ⚠️ `v1.4.0` | ⚠️ `v1.4.0.1` | | 1.21.4-1.21.10 | ⚠️ `v1.3.1` | ⚠️ `v1.4.0` | ⚠️ `v1.4.0` | | 1.21 - 1.21.3 | ⚠️ `v1.3.1` | ⚠️ `v1.4.0` | ⚠️ `v1.4.0` | | 1.20 - 1.20.6 | ⚠️ `v1.3.1` | ❌ Incompatible | ❌ Incompatible | | < 1.20 | ❌ Incompatible | ❌ Incompatible | ❌ Incompatible | ✅ - Actively supported ⚠️ - No longer supported, but versions exist ❌ - Incompatible *Quilt support has been paused due to insufficent usage For information on usage, see wiki page. # Encountering an Error? Feel free to report it to the correct repository: [Fabric Repo](https://github.com/Ramixin/Mixson-Fabric) -=- [Quilt Repo](https://github.com/Ramixin/Mixson-Quilt) -=- [NeoForge Repo](https://github.com/Ramixin/Mixson-NeoForge) ## License --- This project is under an MIT license
